tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Fall — start with a KVD 1.5 in a shad pattern in the backs of creeks. Bass are feeding on shad. Look for surface activity and swarms of shad along creek channel banks, sand/mud flats, rocky shorelines.'

knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Spring = crawfish patterns with red. Summer = shad and bluegill patterns. Fall = shad patterns in creek backs. When the 1.5 hits grass, clear hooks with a hard snap of the rod tip.'
